pokemon:zacian.name: Zacian
pokemon:zacian.summary: This Pokémon has slumbered for many years. Some say it’s Zamazenta’s elder sister—others say the two Pokémon are rivals.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: This Pokémon has slumbered for many years. Some say it’s Zamazenta’s elder sister—others say the two Pokémon are rivals.
Known as a legendary hero, this Pokémon absorbs metal particles, transforming them into a weapon it uses to battle.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: This Pokémon has slumbered for many years. Some say it’s Zamazenta’s elder sister—others say the two Pokémon are rivals.
